zh.lifeSummary: 當Timothy Stampe於1552年出生在英國奧可福爾布盧時，他的父親William Stampe19歲，母親Catherine Hyde27歲。他於1578年與Mary Marie Gunner在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1615年8月8日在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Timothy Stampe于1552年出生在英国奧可福爾布盧时，他的父亲William Stampe19岁，母亲Catherine Hyde27岁。他于1578年与Mary Marie Gunner在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1615年8月8日在他的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德。

nameMeanings.name: Stampe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt.
German: habitational name from a place so named near Kiel.

nameMeanings.name: Timothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form, used in the Authorized Version of the Bible (alongside the Latin form Timotheus), of the Greek name Timotheos, from timē ‘honour’ + theos ‘god’. This was the name of a companion of St Paul; according to tradition, he was stoned to death for denouncing the worship of Diana . It was not used in England before the Reformation but has been in steady use since the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Timothy Stampe was born in 1552, in Bruern, Oxfordshire, England, his father, William Stampe, was 19 and his mother, Catherine Hyde, was 27. He married Mary Marie Gunner in 1578, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 8 August 1615, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Timothy Stampe est né en 1552, à Bruern, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Stampe, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Catherine Hyde, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mary Marie Gunner en 1578, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 8 août 1615, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Timothy Stampe 1552 in Bruern, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Stampe 19 und seine Mutter Catherine Hyde 27. Er hat 1578 in London, Middlesex, England Mary Marie Gunner geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 8. August 1615 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Timothy Stampe è nato il nel 1552 nel Bruern, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, William Stampe, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Hyde, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Mary Marie Gunner nel 1578, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 agosto 1615, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Timothy Stampeが1552年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアブルエルンで生まれた時，父William Stampeは19歳，母Catherine Hydeは27歳であった。1578年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでMary Marie Gunnerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1615年8月8日に故郷で63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアシュイプトン-ウンデル-ウイチウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Timothy Stampe(이)가 1552년 영국 스퍼드실르 브루른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Stampe(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Hyde(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1578년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Mary Marie Gunner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1615년 8월 8일 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 시프토-운더-w이ch우드에 묻혔다.

mn.Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Eng: Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Timothy Stampe nasceu em 1552, em Bruern, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Stampe, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Hyde, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Marie Gunner em 1578, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1615, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Timothy Stampe родился в 1552 г. в местности бруирн, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Stampe было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Hyde, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Marie Gunner в 1578 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 8 августа 1615 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности шиптон-ундир-вичвуд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Timothy Stampe nació en 1552, en Bruern, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Stampe, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Catherine Hyde, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Mary Marie Gunner en 1578, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1615, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
